title: Ruleset
description: Balance constants and formulas. Formulas are structured fixed-point ASTs (see formula.schema.json), not strings, so deterministic replay is preserved across engines and no eval() is ever required.

constants.description: Named integer (or integer-tuple) balance constants. Fractional ratios live as paired numerator/denominator integers (e.g. atkBonusPerPointNum=1, atkBonusPerPointDen=20).

ui.description: Optional UI-only thresholds and editor limits. Content-driven so QA can tune timing without code edits. UI numbers do not enter deterministic gameplay state.

timing.description: Numeric thresholds for tooltip lifecycle, gesture detection, input debounce, and animation gates. Pinned by ui-gestures.md, ui-input-arbitration.md, and ui-state-contract.md.

editor.description: Map-editor history limits and other editor-shell ceilings. See ui-state-contract.md § Undo / Redo.
